title: AI Gangster Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a cinematic crime-drama mugshot.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a fictional crime-drama booking portrait with a classic gangster atmosphere. Preserve the subject's recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Add sharp tailored styling, moody law-enforcement photography, a height-measurement wall, serious expression, realistic skin texture, cinematic noir-inspired lighting, and crisp photorealistic detail. If a placard appears, keep it generic and unreadable.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, changed identity, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, readable text, text overlays, smiling excessively, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. noir crime drama, sharp suit...
